<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete Google Pay payment method"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/payment-methods/google-pay/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



    Delete a Google Pay payment method by ID from the Account.

    ### Permissions
    * `payment-method:delete`
